sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Ross Stores Q4·FY2025: 동일점포매출 9% 성장, EPS 2.00달러로 가이던스 대폭 초과

keyPoints.text: Q4 FY2025 매출은 12% 증가한 66억 달러, 동일점포매출은 전년 동기 3% 성장에 더해 9%가 추가 성장했다.
Q4 EPS는 2.00달러로 가이던스 1.77~1.85달러를 크게 초과했으며, 영업이익률 12.3%도 계획(11.5%~11.8%)을 상회했다.
FY2025 연간 매출은 228억 달러로 사상 최고치를 경신했으며, 연간 EPS는 6.61달러를 달성했다.

riskChanges.text: FY2025 상반기에 관세 영향과 소비자 불확실성으로 어려움이 있었으며, 관세 관련 비용이 주당 약 0.16달러의 이익 희석 효과를 미쳤다.

businessChanges.text: 홀리데이 시즌에 매력적인 상품 구성, 신규 마케팅 캠페인을 통한 고객 참여도 향상, 매장 경험 개선 등이 강한 4분기 실적의 주된 요인이었다.
FY2025 FY2025 연간 총 매출은 전년도 211억 달러에서 8% 증가한 228억 달러로 사상 최고치를 달성했으며, 연간 동일점포매출도 5% 성장했다.
신규 2년 자사주 매입 프로그램 및 분기 배당금 10% 인상을 발표하며 주주환원 강화 의지를 표명했다.

financialHighlights.text: Q4 FY2025 매출은 66억 달러(전년 동기 59억 달러)로 12% 증가했다.
Q4 순이익은 6억 4,600만 달러로 전년 동기 5억 8,700만 달러에서 증가했다.
FY2025 연간 순이익은 21억 달러, EPS는 6.61달러(전년도 6.32달러)를 달성했다. 관세 비용(주당 0.16달러) 및 시설 매각 이익(0.14달러) 제외 시 연간 EPS 성장률은 10%였다.
FY2025 연간 총 매출은 사상 최고치인 228억 달러로 전년 대비 8% 성장했다.

watchItems.text: FY2025 상반기의 관세 영향이 0.16달러 이익 희석을 유발했으며, FY2026에도 관세 및 무역 환경이 핵심 외부 변수로 남아 있다.
사상 최고 매출과 강한 동일점포매출 성장을 바탕으로 FY2026 가이던스가 제시됐으며, Off-price 소매 모델의 경기방어적 특성이 지속되는지 여부가 핵심 모니터링 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q4fy25exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 __________________________________________________________________ FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contacts: William W. Sheehan II Connie Kao Executive Vice President, Senior Vice President, Investor Relations Chief Financial Officer (925) 965-4668 (925) 965-4150 connie.kao@ros.com ROSS STORES REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER EARNINGS WELL ABOVE GUIDANCE ANNOUNCES NEW TWO-YEAR REPURCHASE AUTHORIZATION AND 10% INCREASE IN QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND PROVIDES FIRST QUARTER AND FISCAL 2026 GUIDANCE Dublin, California, March 3, 2026 -- Ross Stores, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROST) today reported financial results for the 13‑week fourth quarter and 52‑week fiscal year ended January 31, 2026. Highlights: • Total sales for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025 grew 12%, with comparable store sales increasing a robust 9% • Fourth quarter operating margin of 12.3% exceeded the

Company’s plan of 11.5% to 11.8%, primarily from the strong sales performance • Earnings per share for the fourth quarter of $2.00 was well above guidance of $1.77 to $1.85 • For the full year, sales reached a record $22.8 billion, with comparable store sales growth of 5%, and earnings per share of $6.61 Jim Conroy, Chief Executive Officer, commented, “We are pleased to report that business momentum accelerated further in the fourth quarter, with both sales and earnings significantly surpassing our expectations. Throughout the holiday season, we delivered compelling merchandise assortments to our stores, benefited from higher customer engagement through our new marketing campaigns, and executed in‑store initiatives that enhanced the customer experience.” ROSS STORES, INC. 5130 Hacienda Drive, Dublin, CA 94568 (925) 965-4400 Mr. Conroy continued, “For the  Normalized numeric aliases: $22.8 billion = 228억 달러; $2.00 = 2.00달러; $1.77 = 1.77달러; $1.85 = 1.85달러; $22.8 = 22.8달러; $6.61 = 6.61달러.

performance. While the first half presented challenges amid a dynamic macroeconomic environment, including the impact of tariffs and broader consumer uncertainty, we remained focused on executing our strategy and managing the business with discipline. As the year progressed, underlying trends steadily improved, reflecting the strength of our merchandising efforts, enhanced marketing programs, and improved shopping experience. This momentum built throughout the back half of the year and culminated in a strong finish, positioning us well as we move into the year ahead.” Fourth Quarter Results Sales increased 12% to $6.6 billion, up from $5.9 billion in 2024. Comparable store sales rose a robust 9% for the quarter on top of a solid 3% gain last year. Net income was $646  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.6 billion = 66억 달러; $5.9 billion = 59억 달러; $646 million = 6억 4,600만 달러; $587 million = 5억 8,700만 달러; $6.6 = 6.6달러; $5.9 = 5.9달러; $646 = 646달러; $587 = 587달러; $1.79 = 1.79달러; $2.00 = 2.00달러.

year period. Excluding a $0.14 per share gain from the sale of a packaway facility in 2024, earnings per share grew 21%. Fiscal 2025 Results Total sales increased to a record $22.8 billion, up 8% compared with last year’s $21.1 billion. Comparable store sales grew 5% on top of a solid 3% gain in fiscal 2024. Net income for fiscal 2025 was $2.1 billion, similar to the prior year, while earnings per share were $6.61, up from $6.32 last year. Excluding the $0.14 per share gain from the facility sale in fiscal 2024 and the approximate $0.16 per share impact from tariff-related costs this year, earnings per share growth for the full year was 10%. Update on Shareholder Payouts During the recently  Normalized numeric aliases: $22.8 billion = 228억 달러; $21.1 billion = 211억 달러; $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; 1.5 million = 150만 달러; $262 million = 2억 6,200만 달러; 7.1 million = 710만 달러; $0.14 = 0.14달러; $22.8 = 22.8달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러; $21.1 = 21.1달러; $6.61 = 6.61달러; $6.32 = 6.32달러; $0.16 = 0.16달러; $262 = 262달러.
